content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?  
RISK-ON environment: Normal volatility (Vol: 25.9%) with broad participation (Breadth: 7/8 sectors positive).

2. Which sectors are leading?  
Technology & Telecom and Energy & Chemicals lead on momentum, Technology & Telecom: KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND and Energy: SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?  
Transportation is the clear laggard with TAVHL (1W: -7.45% | 1M: +9.40%) CORRECTION; Retail & Food and Holding & Investment are the weakest among positives with SOKM (1W: -6.39% | 1M: -1.03%) BELOW TREND and DOHOL (1W: +1.71% | 1M: +1.80%) ABOVE TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?  
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +10.89% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +10.66% | 1M: +0.65%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?  
TAVHL (1W: -7.45% | 1M: +9.40%) CORRECTION, SOKM (1W: -6.39% | 1M: -1.03%) BELOW TREND, TUPRS (1W: -0.59% | 1M: -0.69%) BELOW TREND, OYAKC (1W: -0.23% | 1M: +10.28%) CORRECTION, AEFES (1W: +0.62% | 1M: +10.91%) ABOVE TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?  
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +10.89% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +10.66% | 1M: +0.65%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?  
Banks are participatory and confirming the rally: AKBNK (1W: +6.57% | 1M: +13.91%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +4.27% | 1M: +12.16%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +2.72% | 1M: +11.11%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +1.66% | 1M: +10.89%) ABOVE TREND, VAKBN (1W: +1.32% | 1M: +9.12%) ABOVE TREND.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?  
Heavy industry and autos are directionally strong but varied: EREGL (1W: +2.36% | 1M: +13.30%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +3.89% | 1M: +18.71%) ABOVE TREND, FROTO (1W: +3.80% | 1M: +3.41%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +6.36% | 1M: +4.23%) ABOVE TREND, ARCLK (1W: +1.19% | 1M: +5.04%) ABOVE TREND.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?  
Energy/chemicals lead on breadth but show dispersion: SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +8.85% | 1M: +11.78%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +10.89% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: -0.59% | 1M: -0.69%) BELOW TREND, OYAKC (1W: -0.23% | 1M: +10.28%) CORRECTION.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?  
Lean into RISK-ON: overweight Technology & Telecom, selective Energy & Chemicals and Construction names showing confirmed momentum, and maintain overweight on larger banks; trim low-momentum Transportation exposures and take profits on short-term winners after strong moves.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?  
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND for follow-through or volatility, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND for earnings/volume confirmation, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND on sector flows, AKBNK (1W: +6.57% | 1M: +13.91%) ABOVE TREND for bank-led breadth.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?  
Technology & Telecom for continuation or consolidation, Construction & REIT for earnings momentum, and Energy & Chemicals for dispersion and catalysts.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?  
Watch XU100 reaction to short-term moving averages and international risk sentiment; key triggers are Q1 corporate updates, central bank commentary on rates/FX, and USD/TRY moves that will drive bank and exporter flows.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY  
RISK-ON market with normal volatility and 7/8 sectors positive; momentum is concentrated in Technology & Telecom, Construction and Energy. Opportunity: overweight cyclical leaders and banks; risk: sharp mean reversion in names that ran hardest (KONTR, SASA, TKFEN) and Transportation weakness.
